features.description: Remote MCP tool calls now abort after 5 min idle; override via CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_TOOL_IDLE_TIMEOUT env var.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed remote MCP tool calls that hang with no response for 5 minutes — they now abort with an error instead of blocking indefinitely (override with `CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_TOOL_IDLE_TIMEOUT`)

features.description: Resumed subagents restore original spawn depth and forked subagents now count toward the depth cap.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed subagent depth tracking: resumed subagents now restore their original spawn depth, and forked subagents now count toward the depth cap

features.description: Locked .git/worktrees entries from killed agents are now cleaned up automatically.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed leaked agent worktree registrations: locked `.git/worktrees/` entries from killed agents are now cleaned up automatically

features.description: /install-github-app now allows skipping GitHub Actions workflow/secret setup and installing only the App.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved `/install-github-app`: GitHub Actions workflow setup is now optional — you can install just the GitHub App and skip the workflow/secret steps

features.description: New sandbox.credentials setting blocks sandboxed commands from reading credential files and secret env vars.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `sandbox.credentials` setting to block sandboxed commands from reading credential files and secret environment variables

features.description: Org-configured model restrictions apply to model picker, --model, /model, and ANTHROPIC_MODEL with explanatory message.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added org-configured model restrictions to the model picker, `--model`, `/model`, and `ANTHROPIC_MODEL`, with a "restricted by your organization's settings" message when a restricted model is selected
